title: Duplicate charge on July 15, 2026
description: Customer claims duplicate charge for $49.99 on July 15, 2026.

title: Refund for cancelled service not received
description: Customer states they cancelled subscription on June 30 but were still charged $149.99 on July 1 and refund has not appeared.

title: Unable to access account after password reset
description: User reports that after resetting password, the two-factor authentication codes are not being received.
